producer_output.reason: Opening shot - establish the factory setting and introduce the 'journey' concept.
Transition to 'journey begins' - show fresh ingredients arriving, emphasizing the start of the process.
Shift focus to the 'perfectly seasoned beef patties' - show grilling process, highlighting sizzle and flavor.
Introduce the 'soft, toasted buns' - show them gliding along the line, emphasizing their preparation.
Focus on the 'crisp lettuce, tangy pickles, and savory onions' being added with precision.
Highlight the 'signature sauce' and 'melty cheese' application, showing the final liquid/soft additions.
Emphasize the transformation from 'ingredients' to a 'symphony of flavors' - show the burger coming together.
Transition to the 'assembled with speed and care' phase - show rapid assembly line action.
Shift to the 'factory floor to your hands' concept - show the finished burger moving towards packaging/delivery.
Final shot - emphasize 'crafted for millions around the world' with a dynamic shot of multiple finished burgers or a global map overlay.
Hold final shot to meet target duration and allow for a concluding visual or text overlay.
Hold final shot to meet target duration and allow for a concluding visual or text overlay.
End of video - exact duration match.

Slow zoom out from burger grid to golden arches logo
Text overlay animation over burger close-up

input.script: Ever wonder how a McDonald's hamburger comes to life? Our journey begins as fresh ingredients arrive, ready for their transformation. Watch closely as the perfectly seasoned beef patties are grilled to perfection, sizzling with flavor. Then, the soft, toasted buns glide along the line, awaiting their destiny. Crisp lettuce, tangy pickles, and savory onions are added with incredible precision. A dollop of signature sauce, a slice of melty cheese, and suddenly, it's more than just ingredients. It's a symphony of flavors, assembled with speed and care. From the factory floor to your hands, every McDonald's hamburger is a testament to efficiency and taste, crafted for millions around the world.

visionDocument.core_concept: A high-energy, immersive journey through McDonald's hamburger factory, from the food's perspective.
visionDocument.color_philosophy: Bright, clean, and vibrant colors emphasizing freshness and industrial efficiency, with warm tones for the final product.

userContext.originalPrompt: Create a 1 minute long video 'How McDonald's Hamburgers Are Made in a Factory' make this video from the pov of the food assembly line, like the camera is put near the line where the burger is being made.

dopOutput.movement_rationale: Immerses viewer in factory environment from food's perspective.
dopOutput.handoff_notes: Establishes the setting and POV for the journey.

dopOutput.movement_rationale: Highlights the arrival of raw materials, initiating the process.
dopOutput.handoff_notes: Shows the beginning of the food's transformation journey.

dopOutput.movement_rationale: Emphasizes the sizzling and texture of the patty, conveying flavor.
dopOutput.handoff_notes: Focuses on the core ingredient's preparation and sensory appeal.

dopOutput.movement_rationale: Follows the bun's journey, showing its preparation for assembly.
dopOutput.handoff_notes: Illustrates the next step in the burger's construction.

dopOutput.movement_rationale: Captures the rapid, precise addition of fresh ingredients.
dopOutput.handoff_notes: Shows the layering process and adds visual complexity.

dopOutput.movement_rationale: Highlights the precise application of sauce and cheese, crucial for flavor.
dopOutput.handoff_notes: Emphasizes the final liquid elements that complete the flavor profile.

dopOutput.movement_rationale: Showcases the complete burger, emphasizing its transformation.
dopOutput.handoff_notes: Reveals the finished product, a culmination of all ingredients.

dopOutput.movement_rationale: Demonstrates the speed and automation of the final assembly.
dopOutput.handoff_notes: Conveys the scale and precision of the factory process.

dopOutput.movement_rationale: Follows the burger's journey towards packaging and delivery.
dopOutput.handoff_notes: Connects the factory process to the consumer's experience.

dopOutput.movement_rationale: Illustrates the vast quantity of burgers produced globally.
dopOutput.handoff_notes: Emphasizes the global reach and scale of production.

dopOutput.movement_rationale: Reinforces brand identity and connects product to company.
dopOutput.handoff_notes: Provides a clear brand association for the viewer.

dopOutput.movement_rationale: Allows for clear display of concluding text or message.
dopOutput.handoff_notes: Provides a clean canvas for final information delivery.

dopOutput.movement_rationale: Concludes the video cleanly with a final brand statement.
dopOutput.handoff_notes: Provides a definitive end to the narrative journey.
